title: Operations Manager | Siemens
body: Why Operations Manager? Operate and monitor building equipment and applications in real time — from anywhere. Use Operations Manager to: Increase productivity and transparency by monitoring multiple sites from a single point Enhance business continuity with faster issue response times and reduced equipment downtime Reduce operational and travel expenses through remote monitoring Independently verified digital platform: UL Smart System Verified Platinum for connectivity, cybersecurity and interoperability. Monitor in real time Track a fleet of sites from a single point. Gain a new level of transparency and intelligently inform decision-making. Access aggregated event statistics and operations and see real-time updates of connected sites and equipment. Respond quickly Get instant notifications of operational issues​. Data point values are updated on-the-fly and input commands are processed immediately, down to the building automation control level​. View systems remotely Access your onsite systems securely and easily via the cloud. Avoid unnecessary travel to your buildings with 24/7 remote monitoring. Key features Reduce costs and accelerate incident response times Monitor and troubleshoot remotely Remotely view each building's status and troubleshoot the root cause of issues. Use interactive charts to drill down to the equipment level to analyze alerts and point history. Actively adjust building control systems by commanding setpoints remotely. Also, tunnel to your on-premise systems remotely without making intrusive changes to network environments and view your building management software without VPN. Analyze historical data Automatically log and store values and events on all data points. View data history in interactive charts to analyze different time periods, while also highlighting potential issues that require user attention. Ensure tenant comfort Monitor tenant comfort and gain transparency around building health status with easy-to-understand KPIs. Calculate a comfort status based on real-time data and automatically get signaled for below-average performance detected in any building. Stay informed via email and SMS text message about operational issues of building systems and take corrective measures before they affect your tenants. Create and manage work orders Create and manage work orders by smoothly connecting Brightly Asset Management Software. Quickly react and fix issues via smart work order management integration. Automate their creation in response to system-detected events, or create them manually after analysis of the alarm. Manage event lifecycles (status changes) based on work order inputs. Establish fault detection and diagnostics Compile equipment data points for establishing fault detection and accelerate your workflows. Access our extensive rules library, backed by domain knowledge, to tackle unique challenges. The library contains hundreds of predefined analytics rules based on ASHRAE standards, for areas like air distribution, heating, chilled water, meters and more. Getting started with Operations Manager To use Operations Manager, you need your building connected to and sending data to the Building X platform. Connectivity may seem complex, but it doesn't have to be. Learn about our simplified solutions: Access vendor-agnostic gateways that work with the data collection solutions you already have in place Pull all data into a central data lake — one that all Building X apps use Get help from our services team and ecosystem partners who offer connectivity and implementation assistance Learn more about connectivity Discover how others use Operations Manager To further improve the performance, safety, and operational efficiency of its buildings, Korea-based WONIK HOLDINGS relies on the cloud-based building platform Building X and the Building X application Operations Manager. Higher education Healthcare Commercial real estate Data centers Life sciences and pharma Campuses need comfortable buildings to create optimal learning environments, while also streamlining operations and supporting energy-saving initiatives. Use Operations Manager to get real-time monitoring for data-driven decisions and proactive facility management. Allow automated system adjustments, such as lighting and HVAC control, and preschedule maintenance. Discover more higher education building solutions Healthcare staff need the proper spaces to administer care and facilitate healing for patients. Medical buildings need to be self-sustaining, efficient and comfortable. Use Operations Manager to monitor systems and proactively address issues that effect safety and comfort. Use remote monitoring and diagnostics, and automate systems to manage HVAC and air quality to reduce healthcare associated infections (HAIs). Discover more healthcare solutions Maintaining tenant satisfaction while trying to reduce overhead costs can be a challenge. Use Operations Manager to centralize management of your operations, integrate tenant feedback into your systems, automate maintenance scheduling and optimize resource allocation. Discover more commercial real estate solutions Data centers need to maintain high availability to avoid costly downtimes. They also face high operational costs, increasing complexity and security threats. Use Operations Manager to transform your data centers into resilient, more sustainable facilities. Access real-time monitoring, alert systems and automated failover processes to minimize potential downtimes and ensure reliability. Discover more data center solutions Life sciences and pharmaceutical buildings must ensure optimal conditions for sensitive research and production while maintaining regulatory compliance. Use Operations Manager for environmental monitoring, compliance reporting and system optimization. Maintain precise conditions and ensure compliance with industry regulations. Discover more pharma and life sciences solutions Frequently asked questions Can I use Operations Manager with my current Desigo CC system? Yes. You can directly integrate Desigo CC installations without additional hardware gateways. This integration enables monitoring and control for multiple sites under the umbrella of Operations Manager. You can also remotely connect to the on-premise Desigo CC via a secure connection and use Flex Client for full operation. Can I analyze historical data? Operations Manager stores all changes of values and events for a long time period. The data can be displayed on interactive charts, allowing users to see trends over different time periods, while also highlighting potential issues requiring attention. This helps you understand system behavior and troubleshoot unwanted conditions. How does Operations Manager support business continuity? Operations Manager enables centralized monitoring of all your site events from a single dashboard. This unified view allows you to quickly identify and address issues in real time, ensuring that you can take immediate action before customers are affected. With the ability to directly access and manage sites, you can resolve problems swiftly to minimize downtime and improve overall efficiency. Additionally, you can set up automated notifications via email and text messages for critical events, allowing you to stay informed and to respond quickly even when you're away from your app. This proactive approach helps reduce equipment downtime and enhances tenant satisfaction. How do I create a work order with Operations Manager? Operations Manager seamlessly integrates with Brightly Asset Management Software. You need to have this software to create work orders. Please check with your sales representative, or contact us , for the availability of Brightly Software in your region. Where can I find technical specifications and trainings for Operations Manager? You can find detailed technical information in the Operations Manager data sheet and watch our technical training videos . Where can I find information on application updates? We are continuously updating Building X solutions. Keep up-to-date by regularly visiting our release notes. What regions is Building X available in? For information on regional availability, contact us .
